monster.name: Guardian of Lumina

trait.name: Magic Resistance
trait.text: advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects

trait.name: Immunity to Non-Magical Weapons
trait.text: immune to damage from non-magical or non-silvered weapons

trait.name: Corruption Aura (only if corrupted)
trait.text: each creature within 3m / 10ft / 2qd must make a Constitution save DC 14 at the start of its turn or take 5 (1d10) necrotic damage

action.name: Dark Burst (1/combat, only if corrupted)
action.text: Range: 4.5m / 15ft / 3qd Saving Throw: Dexterity DC 15 Failure: 3d8+6 necrotic damage Success: half damage

monster.description: A huge crouching stone golem, clearly wounded — deep cracks run through its body and stone fragments are missing from its torso and arms. It was a sacred guardian of the Temple of Lumina, now pervaded by Vecna's dark influence. An aura of necromantic energy surrounds it. It does not speak except in single words and monosyllables. It has a rough understanding of human language, not intelligent enough to hold a conversation. It recognizes bearers of the Scepter and their companions as friends and defends them from anyone who claims to want to take it from them. Role: temple guardian, potential ally
